gist.headline: Meet the bot family
gist.blurb: We just dropped a multi-model Discord bot framework into the apps directory. Now you can run Kimi, Gemini, DeepSeek, and even a CatGPT bot all from one cozy script.
gist.summary: Added a functional multi-model Discord bot framework to the apps directory, supporting per-bot channel routing and auto-restarts.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily deploy and manage a whole family of AI bots in their Discord servers, including custom personalities like CatGPT.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy digital treehouse where the pollinations bee is hanging out with a diverse 'family' of small, cute robot companions (representing the different models like CatGPT, DeepSeek, etc.). One robot could have cat ears (CatGPT).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot hosting a tea party for a diverse family of tiny, chunky robots in a digital treehouse. One robot has pixel cat ears, another has a glowing magnifying glass. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot hosting a tea party for a diverse family of tiny, chunky robots in a digital treehouse.
